name: localsearch-extractor-iso
title: localsearch-extractor-iso
description:
Extractor for ISO files
This package contains the ISO file format metadata extractors.
.
Due to distribution complications, this feature is available in a
separate package. Without this, indexing of ISO metadata will not be
supported.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use localsearch-extractor-iso because Extractor for ISO files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use localsearch-extractor-iso as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair localsearch-extractor-iso with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `localsearch-extractor-iso --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
